label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this soccer position swapping problem. So there are five people on the team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start in specific positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Then there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each swap step by step and track where each person ends up. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Dave is a cheerleader and Bob is a right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes the right midfielder and Bob becomes the cheerleader. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Before this swap, Dave is right midfielder and Eve is goalkeeper. So after swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder.
